moments.title: England's World Cup Opener
moments.blurb: England kicks off their FIFA World Cup 2026 campaign against Croatia in Dallas, hoping for a strong start to the tournament.

angles.name: Match Hype
angles.copy: It's finally here! England vs Croatia – the Three Lions begin their World Cup journey tomorrow. Who's ready? #FIFAWorldCup

angles.name: Prediction Call
angles.copy: Tomorrow, 9pm UK time. England vs Croatia. What's your score prediction for the big one? Let us know!

moments.title: Clarkson's Farm S5 Finale
moments.blurb: The final episodes (7-8) of Clarkson's Farm Season 5 drop on Prime Video tomorrow, concluding another dramatic chapter at Diddly Squat.

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: Get ready for more chaos and charm! The final episodes of Clarkson's Farm S5 land on Prime Video tomorrow. What will Jeremy get up to next?

angles.name: Fan Chat
angles.copy: Diddly Squat drama concludes tomorrow! Who's tuning in for the Clarkson's Farm S5 finale? What's been your favourite moment so far?

moments.title: Isle of Wight Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The Isle of Wight Festival 2026 begins on Thursday, June 18th, featuring headliners Lewis Capaldi, Calvin Harris, and The Cure over four days.

angles.name: Festival Excitement
angles.copy: It's almost time! The Isle of Wight Festival kicks off on Thursday with Lewis Capaldi, Calvin Harris, The Cure and so many more. Who's heading to the island?

angles.name: Headliner Spotlight
angles.copy: From Lewis Capaldi to The Cure, the Isle of Wight Festival lineup is stacked this weekend. Which headliner are you most excited for?

moments.title: The Woman in the Wall Premieres
moments.blurb: The new drama series 'The Woman in the Wall', starring Ruth Wilson, premieres on BritBox tomorrow, exploring dark secrets tied to a convent.

angles.name: New Drama Alert
angles.copy: Looking for your next gripping drama? 'The Woman in the Wall' with Ruth Wilson starts tomorrow on BritBox. Don't miss it!

angles.name: Ruth Wilson Buzz
angles.copy: Ruth Wilson leads a chilling new mystery in 'The Woman in the Wall', available from tomorrow. Prepare for buried secrets and dark investigations.

moments.title: Happy 39th Birthday, Kendrick Lamar
moments.blurb: Pulitzer Prize-winning rapper and one of hip-hop's most influential artists, Kendrick Lamar, celebrates his 39th birthday tomorrow.

angles.name: Rap Icon Turns 39
angles.copy: Happy 39th Birthday to the one and only Kendrick Lamar tomorrow! What's your favourite K-Dot track?

angles.name: Celebrating the GOAT
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we're celebrating Kendrick Lamar turning 39! From 'HUMBLE.' to 'Not Like Us', his impact is undeniable.

moments.title: Happy 84th Birthday, Paul McCartney
moments.blurb: Music legend and former Beatle, Sir Paul McCartney, celebrates his 84th birthday on Thursday. He continues to be one of the most influential figures in music history.

angles.name: Macca's Big Day
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 84th Birthday to the iconic Sir Paul McCartney on Thursday! What's your favourite Beatles or Wings track?

angles.name: Living Legend
angles.copy: From the Fab Four to a stellar solo career, Paul McCartney turns 84 this Thursday. A true living legend of music!

moments.title: Happy 77th Birthday, Lionel Richie
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer-songwriter Lionel Richie, known for his soulful ballads and funk hits, turns 77 this Saturday.

angles.name: Hello, It's His Birthday
angles.copy: Is it him you're looking for? Lionel Richie turns 77 this Saturday! What's your go-to Lionel track for 'All Night Long'?

angles.name: Soulful Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible Lionel Richie, who turns 77 on Saturday! His timeless hits still sound 'Easy Like Sunday Morning'.

moments.title: Summer Solstice Approaches
moments.blurb: The Summer Solstice, marking the longest day and shortest night of the year in the Northern Hemisphere, occurs this Sunday, June 21st, at 9:24 AM BST.

angles.name: Longest Day
angles.copy: Sun's out (hopefully!) for longer! The Summer Solstice is this Sunday, June 21st, giving us the longest day of the year. How will you enjoy the extra daylight?

angles.name: Midsummer Magic
angles.copy: Prepare for Midsummer magic! This Sunday marks the Summer Solstice at 9:24 AM BST. Time to embrace the light!

moments.title: England vs Ghana World Cup Match
moments.blurb: England faces Ghana in their second FIFA World Cup 2026 group stage match next Tuesday, June 23rd, in Boston.

angles.name: Second Match Hype
angles.copy: Another big one for England at the World Cup! They take on Ghana next Tuesday. What are your hopes for this game?

angles.name: Group Stage Battle
angles.copy: After Croatia, it's Ghana next for England in the World Cup group stage on Tuesday. Crucial points up for grabs!

moments.title: Happy 82nd Birthday, Ray Davies
moments.blurb: The influential English musician and Kinks frontman, Ray Davies, celebrates his 82nd birthday this Sunday.

angles.name: Kinks Icon
angles.copy: Happy 82nd Birthday to the legendary Kinks frontman, Ray Davies, this Sunday! Which Kinks classic is your favourite?

angles.name: Britpop Godfather
angles.copy: Often called the 'Godfather of Britpop', Ray Davies turns 82 on Sunday. A true icon of British music!

moments.title: Happy 73rd Birthday, Cyndi Lauper
moments.blurb: The flamboyant pop icon and 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun' singer, Cyndi Lauper, celebrates her 73rd birthday next Monday.

angles.name: 80s Pop Queen
angles.copy: Next Monday, we're celebrating the one and only Cyndi Lauper turning 73! What's your favourite hit from this pop queen?

angles.name: Still Having Fun
angles.copy: From 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun' to 'Time After Time', Happy 73rd Birthday to Cyndi Lauper next Monday!

moments.title: Happy 41st Birthday, Lana Del Rey
moments.blurb: The acclaimed singer-songwriter Lana Del Rey, known for her cinematic and melancholic pop, celebrates her 41st birthday this Sunday.

angles.name: Pop Queen's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 41st Birthday to the incredible Lana Del Rey this Sunday! What's your favourite track from her iconic discography?

angles.name: Celebrating Lana
angles.copy: From 'Video Games' to 'Summertime Sadness', Lana Del Rey turns 41 this Sunday. Send her some love!

moments.title: Happy 45th Birthday, Brandon Flowers
moments.blurb: The charismatic frontman of The Killers, Brandon Flowers, celebrates his 45th birthday this Sunday.

angles.name: Killers' Leader
angles.copy: Happy 45th Birthday to The Killers' iconic frontman, Brandon Flowers, this Sunday! What's your favourite Killers anthem?

angles.name: Mr. Brightside's Birthday
angles.copy: Feeling 'Mr. Brightside' vibes? Brandon Flowers turns 45 this Sunday! Celebrate with your favourite Killers track.

moments.title: Happy 83rd Birthday, Barry Manilow
moments.blurb: The legendary singer-songwriter Barry Manilow, known for hits like 'Mandy' and 'Copacabana', celebrates his 83rd birthday tomorrow.

angles.name: Fanilow Birthday
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the one and only Barry Manilow turns 83! Which of his classic ballads is your all-time favourite?

angles.name: Copacabana King
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible career of Barry Manilow, who turns 83 tomorrow! Still making us sing along to 'Copacabana'.
